rental.earthMovingDesc: Whether you want to rent a mini excavator, dumper or wheel loader, we have the right solution for your needs. Rent reliable and powerful machines from us to carry out your construction projects efficiently and successfully. With our excavators and dumpers you are perfectly equipped to move heavy loads and carry out earthworks.
rental.sustainableBuildingDesc: Want your project to be sustainable? We have fully electric dumpers!

products.title: Our Rental Products
products.subtitle: Over 800 products in 16 categories – from construction machinery to event equipment. Everything available online with transparent prices.
products.weekendTitle: Rent Friday, return Monday – pay only 1 day!
products.weekendDesc: Many products include our popular weekend rate: Pick up Friday afternoon and return Monday morning – you only pay for one rental day.

about.heroDesc: Since 2016, we have been your reliable partner for construction machinery, trailers and equipment rental in North Rhine-Westphalia. What started as a small idea is now a company with over 800 rental products at 3 locations.
about.storyP1: In 2016, we founded SLT Rental with a clear vision: to make construction machinery and equipment rental simpler, faster and more customer-friendly.
about.storyP2: What started with just a few machines in Krefeld is now a company with over 800 rental products and locations in Krefeld, Bonn and Mülheim.
about.storyP3: Our recipe for success? Personal service, fair prices and equipment you can rely on. Whether you're a private individual with a weekend project or a construction company with a major contract – we find the right solution.
about.teamDesc: The people behind SLT Rental – personal, competent and always there for you.
about.valueCustomerDesc: Personal advice and individual solutions are at the heart of what we do.
about.valueQualityDesc: Regularly maintained equipment and reliable service.
about.valueRegionalDesc: 3 locations in NRW – always nearby with fast availability.
about.valueFlexDesc: From one day to several months – we adapt to your project.
about.whyDesc: What sets us apart? A combination of experience, service and the drive to always improve.
whyItems: Fair, transparent prices with no surprises
about.partnerDealerNote: Official dealer: SLT Rental is an authorized dealer for Zoomlion excavators and aerial work platforms in NRW.
about.ctaDesc: Explore our equipment range or contact us for personal advice.

howItWorks.heroDesc: Get your rental equipment in 5 simple steps – book online, pick up on site or have it delivered.
howItWorks.step1Desc: First, select your preferred location (Krefeld, Bonn or Mülheim) and your desired rental period. The calendar shows you availability in real time.
howItWorks.step1Tip1: Weekend conditions: Fri–Mon at special prices
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse our catalog for the right equipment. Use filters for category, working height, weight class and more.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add your desired product to the cart, check the rental price and complete the booking. You'll receive an instant booking confirmation.
howItWorks.step3Tip1: Transparent prices with no hidden costs
howItWorks.step4Desc: After booking, you'll receive an email with all details: booking number, pickup address, opening hours and pickup checklist.
howItWorks.step4Tip2: Changes possible by phone or email (fees may apply)
howItWorks.step5Desc: Pick up your equipment at the chosen location or have it delivered directly to your construction site. Upon return, we'll check the condition together.
howItWorks.weekendTitle: 🎉 Weekend Rate: Rent More, Pay Less!
howItWorks.weekendDesc: Many products include our popular weekend rate:
howItWorks.weekendHighlight: Pick up Friday from 12:00 PM, return Monday by 8:00 AM – at special conditions!
howItWorks.weekendItem1: Applies to most construction machinery & trailers
howItWorks.b2bDesc: Register as a business customer and benefit from individual conditions, framework agreements and simplified billing.
howItWorks.b2bStep1Desc: Create a B2B account with your company details, VAT ID and accept the terms. After review by our team, your account will be activated.
howItWorks.b2bStep2Desc: In the B2B portal, you'll see your individual conditions, category discounts and customer-specific prices – automatically calculated.
howItWorks.b2bStep3Desc: Submit bulk inquiries for multiple rental items with individual periods. You'll receive a binding quote with all details.
howItWorks.b2bStep4Desc: A protocol is created upon handover. After the rental ends, the return includes a condition check and automatic invoicing.
b2bTips: Weekend Fri–Mon: special conditions (not a single rental day)
Changes possible by phone or email (fees may apply)
Credit limit & open invoices viewable in dashboard at any time
Personal contact person at your nearest location
howItWorks.reqDepositDesc: Depending on the product, a deposit is required which will be refunded upon return. The amount is shown during booking.
howItWorks.reqIdDesc: Please bring a valid ID. A driver's license is required for certain vehicles and trailers.
howItWorks.reqBusinessDesc: Business customers register in the B2B portal and benefit from framework agreements and simplified billing.
howItWorks.faqDesc: In our FAQ, you'll find answers to the most common questions about rental, booking, delivery and billing.

contact.heroDesc: Do you have questions about our products, booking or need personal advice? We're here for you – by phone, email or WhatsApp.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.privacy: I have read the <link>Privacy Policy</link> and agree to the processing of my data. *
contact.required: * Required fields. We usually respond within 24 hours.
contact.b2bDesc: Register in the B2B portal and benefit from framework agreements, simplified billing and personal support.

faq.heroDesc: Here you'll find answers to the most common questions about rental, booking, delivery and more.
faq.cat1Q1: What products can I rent from you?
faq.cat1A1: We offer over 800 products in 5 categories: Construction machinery (excavators, wheel loaders, compactors), Trailers (car, tipper, transport trailers), Aerial work platforms (scissor, telescopic, mast platforms), Event equipment (tents, stages, technology) and Drying/Heating (construction dryers, heaters, fans).
faq.cat1Q2: How long can I rent equipment?
faq.cat1A2: The minimum rental period varies by product – usually from 1 day. Long-term rentals over several weeks or months are possible and often cheaper. Feel free to ask us about special conditions.
faq.cat1A3: For many products: pick up Friday from 12:00 PM, return Monday by 8:00 AM – and you only pay one rental day! The weekend rate is calculated automatically.
faq.cat1Q4: Do I need special licenses or certifications?
faq.cat1A4: A corresponding driver's license is required for certain vehicles and trailers. We recommend training for aerial work platforms. Details can be found on the respective product page.
faq.cat2A1: Select your product, check availability for your desired period and add it to the cart. After booking, you'll receive a confirmation email with all details.
faq.cat2A2: Private customers pay at pickup (debit card, credit card, cash). B2B customers can pay by invoice after registration.
faq.cat2Q3: Do I need to pay a deposit?
faq.cat2A3: Yes, depending on the product, a deposit is required. The amount is shown during booking. The deposit is refunded upon proper return.
faq.cat2Q4: Can I cancel or change my booking?
faq.cat2A4: Yes, contact us by phone or email. Short-notice cancellations may incur fees depending on the product. Details can be found in our terms and conditions.
faq.cat3Q1: Where can I pick up the equipment?
faq.cat3A1: At our 3 locations: Krefeld (headquarters), Bonn and Mülheim an der Ruhr. Opening hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
faq.cat3A2: Yes! We deliver throughout NRW. Costs depend on distance and equipment. Delivery prices from €49 (up to 25km).
faq.cat3Q3: What do I need for pickup?
faq.cat3A3: Please bring a valid ID. For vehicles/trailers, the corresponding driver's license. The deposit can be paid by debit card or cash.
faq.cat3A4: Please inform us in time! Unplanned delays incur additional rental costs. Call us if you need more time.
faq.cat4Q1: What advantages do I have as a B2B customer?
faq.cat4A1: After registration, you benefit from framework agreements, invoice payment, personal contacts, simplified booking and special conditions for large projects.
faq.cat4Q2: How do I register as a B2B customer?
faq.cat4A2: Fill out the registration form in the B2B portal and upload your business registration or trade register excerpt. We'll review your information and activate your account within 1-2 business days.
faq.cat4Q3: Can I submit a project inquiry?
faq.cat4A3: Yes! In the B2B dashboard, you can submit project inquiries for larger projects. We'll create an individual quote for you.
faq.ctaDesc: No problem! Our team is happy to help – by phone, email or WhatsApp.

karriere.heroDesc: We're looking for motivated talent who want to shape the rental industry with us. Discover our current job openings and benefits.
karriere.benefitsDesc: At SLT, you can expect more than just a job – we offer a work environment where you can thrive and develop.
karriere.ctaDesc: We also welcome unsolicited applications! Simply send us your documents and tell us why you're a great fit for SLT.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.subtitle: Information on the protection of your personal data in accordance with GDPR
datenschutz.s3Intro: We process your personal data when you:
datenschutz.s3Item1: visit our website (data automatically collected by the web server such as IP address, date/time, pages accessed, browser type, operating system)
datenschutz.s3Item3: enter into a rental agreement via our online shop
datenschutz.s3Item4: contact us by email, phone or post
s3Data: Contract data (e.g. rental item, period, price)
Usage data (IP address, time, pages accessed)
datenschutz.s4Title: Purposes and Legal Bases of Processing

s4Items.purpose: Based on your consent, e.g. for cookies/tracking
To protect our legitimate interests, e.g. for IT security, web statistics, marketing

datenschutz.s5Desc: We use cookies and comparable technologies on our website. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that contain certain information about you (e.g. for the functionality of the online shop, for analysis purposes or for marketing).
datenschutz.s5TechDesc: Required for the operation of the site and the shop.
datenschutz.s5AnalyticsDesc: Only with your consent on first visit (cookie banner/consent tool).
datenschutz.s5Revoke: You can revoke your consent at any time via our cookie tool or your browser settings.
datenschutz.s6Desc: When you contact us by form, email or phone, we store and process your information to handle your inquiry and for follow-up questions. The data will not be shared with third parties without your consent.
datenschutz.s7P1: For processing bookings/rental agreements, we additionally process your contract and payment data. Without this data, a contract cannot be concluded.
datenschutz.s7P2: For payment processing, we may use external payment service providers (e.g. PayPal, Stripe, Klarna). Their privacy policy applies to the processing of your data by these providers.
datenschutz.s8P1: We only share your data with third parties when this is necessary for contract fulfillment (e.g. transport providers, payment providers) or when a legal obligation exists.
datenschutz.s8P2: We work with external IT and hosting service providers who process your data only according to our instructions and on the basis of a data processing agreement (Art. 28 GDPR).
datenschutz.s9Desc: Our website may integrate third-party services (e.g. Google Maps for location display, social plugins). When accessing such content, personal data may be transferred to these providers, potentially to countries outside the EU. The privacy policies of the respective providers apply.
datenschutz.s10Desc: We store your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the respective purposes or as we are legally required to retain them (in particular tax and commercial retention periods).
datenschutz.s11Intro: You have the right at any time to:

s11Rights.right: access information about your personal data stored by us
revoke your consent (with effect for the future)

datenschutz.s11Contact: Please direct your request to the contact address mentioned above. You also have the right to file a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
datenschutz.s12Desc: We take technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction or access by unauthorized persons. Our security measures are continuously improved in line with technological developments.
datenschutz.s13Desc: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy at any time, e.g. in the event of changes to laws, our website or our services.
